# neon_database (Data Source)

Retrieves information about a Neon database.

## Example Usage

```terraform
data "neon_database" "example" {
  project_id = "your-project-id"
  branch_id  = "your-branch-id"
  name       = "your-database-name"
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `branch_id` (String) The branch ID.
- `name` (String) The database name.
- `project_id` (String) The project ID.

### Read-Only

- `created_at` (String) The creation timestamp.
- `id` (Number) The database ID.
- `owner_name` (String) The name of the role that owns the database.
- `updated_at` (String) The last update timestamp.
